name: Amaretto Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
In a large bowl, combine the flour and powdered sugar.
Cut in the butter with a pastry blender or 2 knives until crumbly.
Press the mixture firmly into the prepared pan.
Bake for 20 minutes.
In a small bowl, stir the cornstarch into the amaretto until dissolved.
Stir in the sweetened condensed milk.
Pour the mixture evenly over the prebaked crust.
Top with chocolate chips, coconut flakes, and almonds; press down firmly.
Bake for an additional 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Cool in the pan on a wire rack. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
